name: Robotic
title: Robotic - Free Responsive Template
description: Technology-focused single-page template with a fixed top navigation bar and full-width hero section featuring a large background image with overlay text. Sections include Services with four icon-based feature cards in a grid, Packages/Pricing with three tiered plan cards showing features and pricing, About section with company description and team member photos, and Contact section with a four-field form and Google Maps integration. Smooth scroll navigation between sections. Teal/cyan accent color. Font Awesome icons throughout. Animated scroll effects on section entry. Professional corporate layout suitable for tech companies.

typography.style: Open Sans with clean readability, professional weight hierarchy

layoutDetails: Fixed top navbar with smooth scroll anchors. Full-width hero with background image. Services in 4-column grid, pricing in 3-column grid, team in grid layout.
visualStyle: Professional tech corporate with teal accent, clean white backgrounds, icon-driven service cards, and structured grid layouts. Modern flat design.

name: Infinite Loop
title: Infinite Loop - Bootstrap 4.0 HTML Template
description: Technology and business template built on Bootstrap 4 with parallax sections and a modern professional design. Opens with a full-screen parallax hero section featuring the title with a brief description and CTA button. The What We Do section presents four service cards with icons and descriptions in a two-column grid. A testimonials section with parallax background displays client reviews in a Slick carousel slider. A gallery section shows an 8-image grid with Magnific Popup lightbox. A contact section includes a form alongside contact information with Font Awesome icons, set against a parallax background. Embedded Google Maps iframe. Footer with copyright and social links.

typography.style: Clean sans-serif throughout. Semi-bold headings with light body weight. Blue accent for links and buttons.

layoutDetails: Full-screen parallax hero. Two-column service cards grid. Parallax testimonials with carousel. Four-column image gallery grid. Two-column contact section with form and info. Embedded Google Map.
visualStyle: Professional tech/business aesthetic. Alternating white content and parallax image sections. Blue accent color. Card-based service layouts. Magnific Popup lightbox gallery.

name: Neuron
title: Neuron HTML CSS Template
description: Multi-page blog template with particles.js animated hero background. Home page features fullscreen hero with particle animation overlay, heading, and CTA. Below, five blog posts in single-column layout with large featured images, author avatars, dates, comment counts, and excerpts. One post includes embedded YouTube video. Separate pages for About, Gallery, and Contact. Fixed navbar. Preloader animation. Serif typography with Merriweather headings and Lora body for editorial feel.

typography.style: Editorial serif pairing with bold headings and light body. Classic blog typography.

layoutDetails: Multi-page blog with fixed navbar. Home page has fullscreen parallax hero with particles.js, then single-column blog post list. Separate about, gallery, and contact pages.
visualStyle: Classic editorial blog with serif typography, large featured images, author avatars, and particle animation hero. Clean, content-focused with minimal decoration.

name: Stackcraft
title: StackCraft — Clean Code, Sharp Solutions
description: Developer portfolio with dark warm charcoal background and gold accents. Hero with Full-Stack Developer label, italic headline, TypeScript code block with syntax highlighting. About with photo and stats. Skills with progress bars, tech stack icons, GitHub contribution heatmap. Four project cards. Vertical timeline experience. Contact form. Scroll-reveal animations.

typography.style: Serif headings with italic emphasis on dark background

layoutDetails: Single-page with sticky nav. Hero with code block. Skills with progress bars. Project cards. Vertical timeline.
visualStyle: Premium dark developer portfolio with warm charcoal and gold. Code block. GitHub heatmap.
